title: batch-初中数学知识梳理师-004
initialPrompt: 请开始这次单场景教学问答。
studentInitialQuestion: I'm RodriguezSadie, a 6th grade girl who loves Go and table tennis. I plan things well and am good at self-learning, but my logical thinking isn't that strong, so I use self-correction and like to keep clear boundaries. As a mathematics education expert, could you please detailedly explain the key topics and common pitfalls in 6th grade math, and share some strategies that suit someone like me? Please, just detailedly talk about it.
